tasks.subject: Task 1: Install dependencies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `marked`, `dompurify`, `@tailwindcss/typography`, and `@types/dompurify` to the dashboard package.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/package.json`
- Modify: `dashboard/src/index.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm --dir dashboard install` succeeds
- [ ] `@tailwindcss/typography` plugin registered in CSS
- [ ] `prose` utility class is available

**Verify:** `pnpm --dir dashboard build` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/package.json", "dashboard/src/index.css"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pnpm install succeeds", "typography plugin registered in CSS", "prose class available"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create SSE parser composable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement `useSSEParser.ts` with `aggregateSSE()` and `extractContent()` functions.

**Files:**
- Create: `dashboard/src/composables/useSSEParser.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] parseSSEEvents() splits SSE body into typed event objects
- [ ] detectFormat() correctly identifies all 3 formats
- [ ] aggregateSSE() builds non-streaming JSON
- [ ] extractContent() returns {thinking, reply}
- [ ] OpenAI Responses prefers response.completed

**Verify:** `pnpm --dir dashboard type-check` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/composables/useSSEParser.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseSSEEvents splits SSE into events", "detectFormat identifies all 3 formats", "aggregateSSE builds non-streaming JSON", "extractContent returns thinking/reply", "response.completed preferred", "malformed events handled gracefully"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Create ResponseArtifactView component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build ResponseArtifactView.vue with sub-view switching (Raw / Aggregated / Rendered).

**Files:**
- Create: `dashboard/src/components/ResponseArtifactView.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] SegmentedControl switches sub-views
- [ ] Raw shows pretty-printed JSON
- [ ] Aggregated shows SSE aggregation (SSE only)
- [ ] Rendered shows thinking/reply markdown
- [ ] Binary body hides non-raw views

**Verify:** `pnpm --dir dashboard type-check` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/components/ResponseArtifactView.vue"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SegmentedControl switches sub-views", "Raw shows pretty-printed JSON", "Aggregated shows SSE aggregation", "Rendered shows thinking/reply markdown", "Binary body hides non-raw views", "SSE detected via Content-Type header"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire ResponseArtifactView into RawArtifactView
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Modify RawArtifactView.vue to delegate response rendering to ResponseArtifactView.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/src/components/RawArtifactView.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Request rendering unchanged
- [ ] Response rendering via ResponseArtifactView
- [ ] Loading/error/empty states preserved

**Verify:** `pnpm --dir dashboard type-check` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/components/RawArtifactView.vue"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["request rendering unchanged", "response rendering delegated to ResponseArtifactView", "loading/error/empty states preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Verify end-to-end and lint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ensure full feature works — build, type-check, lint all pass.

**Files:**
- No new files

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] type-check passes
- [ ] lint passes
- [ ] build passes

**Verify:** All three commands exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["type-check passes", "lint passes", "build passes"]}
```
